title: Make project-memory task creation concurrency-safe
description: Prevent task ID collisions and silent overwrite risk when multiple task-open mutations happen close together. The runtime should serialize project-memory writes or switch to collision-safe task identity generation.
triage_notes: Completed in v2.3 runtime integrity hardening: project-memory task creation now uses a project-level mutation lock and collision-safe canonical indexing under concurrent task-open activity.
